_comment: CANARY-SCOPE allow-list — NOT an authoritative production registry. Three reference issuers for span-provenance + device-mesh integration tests only. public_key_pem is null at v1; real keys land in v1.1.

sec.gov.notes: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission — regulatory filings (EDGAR). Canonical issuer for financial-document ingestion paths.

mfds.go.kr.notes: Korea Ministry of Food and Drug Safety — regulatory approvals and device certifications. Canonical issuer for the device-mesh regulatory source.

fda.gov.notes: U.S. Food and Drug Administration — regulatory guidance and approvals. Canonical issuer for biomedical ingestion paths.
